summary: Phase 3 final audit - ALL 3 features PASS. (1) Stylist redesign: stylist-sticky-search at TOP with chat-input + chat-send (circular up-arrow); auto-weather-pill (21°C·clear) rendered; all 9 preset chips (work/weekend/date_night/travel/wedding/casual/formal/hot_weather/cold_weather) found; empty state shows TRENDING NOW label + all 8 trending-chip-* (Wedding gues, Rainy day co, Beach vacati, Office to di, Weekend brun, Gym to coffe, Festival fit, Job intervie - sliced to 12 chars per code); chat-clear (X) successfully empties input; typing 'office outfit' + chat-send produces 'The Look' board card; after page reload + return to Stylist tab, RECENT block with recent-chip-office outfi and clear-recent rendered (AsyncStorage persistence verified). (2) Wheel pickers: at /profile-edit?mode=edit&step=body all six testIDs render (onboard-height, onboard-weight, onboard-shoe, onboard-chest, onboard-waist, onboard-hips); all are DIVs (ScrollView wheel pickers), NOT INPUT elements - visual centered band confirmed in screenshot. (3) Friends sub-tab direct-chat: friend-chat-0053b8bc-... icon button found on Alice's row; tapping navigated to /social/chat/ccd49786-...?name=Alice; header correctly shows 'Alice' (not 'Chat'); empty state reads 'Start the conversation with Alice.'
critical_code_review_comments: Stylist tab keeps in-memory messages across tab switches (component does not unmount in Expo Router tabs). Recent-searches block only re-appears in empty state after a fresh app load. The review request wording 'navigate to a different tab and back...EMPTY STATE should now show recent-searches' is slightly misleading - empty state requires messages.length===0. Verified via page reload that AsyncStorage persistence works correctly. Consider adding a 'New chat' / clear button if E1 wants tab-switch behaviour.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing Alice friendship for chat icon test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user test@closetai.com has 0 wardrobe items and 1 friend (Alice). Stylist messages persist in component state across tab switches; only a full page reload empties state and reveals recent-searches block from AsyncStorage. chat-send native disabled attribute is False on web RN (uses opacity 0.4 + onPress guard) - this is expected RN-web behaviour, not a bug.
